projectDescription: A Django-based ecommerce platform for electronics and home goods, featuring Google OAuth authentication, Wompi payment processing, and Cloudinary media storage.
keyFeatures: Django 5.2 web framework with modular settings for local and production environments
Google OAuth social authentication via django-allauth
Wompi payment gateway integration for ecommerce transactions
Cloudinary media storage for product images and user uploads
PostgreSQL database support with dj-database-url configuration
Whitenoise static file serving for production deployments
SSL/HTTPS enforcement with CSRF and session security in production
Deployment-ready configuration for Render and Railway platforms
publicApiSurface: DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE - environment variable to select settings module
build.sh - production build and deployment script
CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME / CLOUDINARY_API_KEY / CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET - media storage credentials
CSRF_TRUSTED_ORIGINS - allowed CSRF origins for production
